title: echites mollis
intro: Echites mollis, also known as the snake flower, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating snake and insect bites, and aiding in wound healing. Echites mollis can be prepared as a decoction or tincture for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
